name: mol-plugin
description: Maintenance toolkit for the molcrafts marketplace itself. Three skills: /mol-plugin:new-skill (scaffold), /mol-plugin:check (the marketplace's own structural self-audit, parallel to /mol-agent:check for projects), /mol-plugin:release (unified version bump + local commit + local tag; gates through /mol:ship commit; pair with /mol:tag to push the tag to upstream).
